page_metadata.biotools__summary: Fast X-ray Scattering (FoXS) is a web server for computing the small angle x-ray scattering (SAXS) structure profile of a molecule in solution and for comparing the computed profile to the experimental profile.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Fast X-ray Scattering (FoXS) is a web server for computing the small angle x-ray scattering (SAXS) structure profile of a molecule in solution and for comparing the computed profile to the experimental profile.
